steps.title: Use the discovery context
steps.content: The sentence says genetic research only recently did something to show maize's ancestor was teosinte grass. The needed verb must mean that research uncovered or made known a fact that had not been clearly identified before.

steps.title: Reject verbs that cannot fit
steps.content: Choice A cannot logically take an ancestor as its object in this construction. Choice C would mean research encouraged the ancestor, which is nonsensical. Choice D refers to making a formal request, not discovering a scientific relationship. The answer is B.
